creator: inoue.takashi@nihon-u.ac.jp
text:
I see the following error every time I shutdown system.

Waiting for PIDS: 1827Dec 31 12:07:23 X1Nano pulseaudio[1975]: [(null)] core-util.c: Failed to create secure directory (/var/run/user/1001/pulse): No such file or directory.

This may be related to MATE which I use. I use the default sound system OSS.
